title: Sweet Gooey Brazilian Chicken Casserole
description: A sweet and spicy Brazilian-inspired casserole perfect for a lazy Sunday, featuring chicken, vegetables, and a blend of cheeses, with a kick of hot chilli powder.

ingredients.name: canned black beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the chopped onion and red bell pepper. Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked chicken, onion, bell pepper, hot chilli powder, paprika, garlic powder, low-sodium chicken broth, and black beans. Stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, mix the shredded mozzarella and cheddar cheese.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, arrange half of the chicken mixture in the bottom of the dish. Top with half of the cheese mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with the remaining chicken mixture, then the remaining cheese mixture.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
